author: y4rr
content:
Phase 1B complete. APPROVE-WITH-FOLLOW-UPS.

Diff (uncommitted, ready):
- ferrotorch-vision/tests/conformance_vision_models.rs: refactored mod resnet50_value_parity_pipeline -> mod value_parity_pipeline. Generic helpers (load_torchvision_state_into_module taking &mut dyn Module<f32>; assert_allclose with per-element |a-e| <= abs_tol + rel_tol * |e| semantics; run_value_parity_test orchestrator; run_loader_probe_suite). Phase 1A's 5 ResNet50 tests now run through the refactored helpers (still pass, max_abs 4.482e-5).
- ferrotorch-vision/tests/conformance/fixtures_value_parity.json: grew from 1 to 7 entries (resnet50 + 6 new). 2743 line growth from the param/buffer key enumerations.
- scripts/regenerate_vision_fixtures.py: factored into _emit_value_parity_descriptor + 7 thin per-model adapters. Merge-into-existing semantics (preserves cumulative state across --models invocations).

Key result: phase 1A's OR-of-max tolerance (max_abs <= abs_tol || max_rel <= rel_tol) replaced with per-element torch.allclose semantics. Failure mode #16 closed in the template before any further replication.

Discovery: all 6 candidate models in the Phase 1B set are architecturally divergent from torchvision by design. Each model's src/ header literally documents the simplification ('We omit batch norm', 'no MBConv', 'single Inception-A style module', etc). The strict loader (Phase 1A's 4-way honest-fail) errors at UnmappedFixtureKey before forward runs. 6 issues filed: #989-#994.

Coordination boundaries held: 0 changes to ferrotorch-{core,nn,vision}/src/. 30 #[ignore] annotations all cite the corresponding issue number.

Verification (architect):
- cargo test -p ferrotorch-vision -- value_parity_pipeline: 5 passed, 30 ignored
- cargo test -p ferrotorch-vision (full): exit 0, no regression
- cargo clippy -p ferrotorch-vision --tests --all-targets -- -D warnings: clean
- git status --short: 3 text files only, no binaries
- git check-ignore -v vs 6 new safetensors paths: all matched
- src/ header spot-checks for 4 of 6 models: subagent quotes verified

Meta-finding: ResNet50 may be the only model in the v0.5.0 vision crate that is actually torchvision-alignable (ResNet18/VGG11 already known broken via #860). 'Phase 3 fixes CPU-pulls' was a subset of a larger story: 'most vision models ship as documented simplified approximations'. Architectural-completion phase will be needed before further value-parity testing can extend.

Closing #985 as architect-approved.
